title: campylospermum glomeratum
intro: Campylospermum glomeratum, a species of plant in the family Ochnaceae, is a flowering plant native to tropical Africa. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Campylospermum glomeratum include its potential to reduce fever, treat skin conditions, and support the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is prepared into various herbal remedies, such as infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which can be used to treat a range of ailments.
